# agent-plugins

> Public plugin marketplace for AI coding agents — a monorepo of Markdown
> plugins installable with Claude Code's native marketplace mechanism, with
> agent-agnostic docs so the plugins aren't tied to a single agent.

## Plugins

- [claude-token-debug](plugins/claude-token-debug/AGENTS.md): A debugging toolkit for Claude Code itself, measuring real subagent transcripts and inspecting built-in agent prompts and tool schemas to answer where token spend actually goes.
- [sdd-kit](plugins/sdd-kit/AGENTS.md): A spec-driven development kit carrying a feature from a rough idea to an executable task graph via spec, plan, exec, and verify stages.
- [token-diet](plugins/token-diet/AGENTS.md): A single, explicit-invocation command that installs an opt-in token-saving ruleset into a project's or user's instructions file.
